# mailcow_fwdhost (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_fwdhost" "trusted_relay" {
  hostname    = "relay.example.com"
  filter_spam = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String) Hostname or IP of the forwarding host

### Optional

- `filter_spam` (Boolean) Whether to apply spam filtering to emails from this host

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
